products.name: Pokémon Diecast Replica Heal Ball
products.description:
The Wand Company's range of die-cast Poké Ball Replicas are the first officially-licensed premium
collectible replicas for Pokémon fans.

This premium quality, highly accurate Heal Ball replica is made with an engineered metal shell, has a beautifully colored surface that is sensitive to touch and proximity and features a brightly illuminated button and lift-to-display illuminated presentation case. This Heal Ball promises to be a wonderful addition to any Pokémon collection!

Ideal for collectors, the replica comes with a presentation case - authenticated by a uniquely numbered hologram - and a polished stainless-steel ring, so that you can display your Heal Ball however you want.

Enjoy multi-colored lights glowing under the Heal Ball when you open the case; control them by
touching the case's metal plaque.

Product Features:

- Highly accurate, electronic, display-grade replica with a finely detailed metal shell and a premium painted finish
- Lovingly brought to life with proximity-sensing technology
- Motion sensor activated multicolor button that changes light color or starts a Pokémon-catching illumination sequence.
- Opening presentation case lifts Poké Ball for display
- Uniquely-numbered collectible
- Officially licensed by The Pokémon Company International

What's in the box:

- Die-Cast Heal Ball Replica
- Matte black presentation display case with polished Poké Ball icon on the lid
- Highly polished stainless steel display ring
- Illustrated manual
- Batteries included

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian Black Series Carbonized Action Figure 2021 Shoretrooper 15 cm
products.description:
During the height of the Empire, shoretroopers would patrol the beaches and bunkers of the Imperial military headquarters.

The 6-inch-scale Carbonized Collection Shoretrooper figure is carefully detailed to look like the character from The Mandalorian live-action series on Disney+, featuring premium detail, multiple points of articulation, and a metallic finish.

products.name: Harry Potter Pendant & Necklace Silver Glasses & Lightning Bolt (Sterling Silver)
products.description:
This Harry Potter Sterling Silver Lightning Bolt and glasses necklace is made from Sterling Silver with a gold-plated lightning bolt. This necklace is perfect for adding a touch of magical glamour to any Harry Potter fan.

- Gold-plated Sterling Silver Glasses & Lightning Bolt Pendant
- Approx 18 mm.
- Sterling Silver Necklace 16 inches with 2.5 inches extender chain.

Compatible with other Harry Potter charms, bracelets and necklaces.

Presented in Harry Potter Branded Gift Box and Gift Bag.

products.name: Lilo & Stitch Mini Egg Attack Figures 2-Pack Stitch Series Asian Cuisine 8 cm
products.description: We all know Stitch (from Lilo and Stitch fame) is a food fanatic, and if we imagined him traveling the world we are confident he would find much to love in Asian cuisine. Beast Kingdom's classic 3-inch Mini Egg Attack (MEA) series is ready to take on the challenge of introducing Stitch to some fantastic dishes with the launch of the MEA-031SP Stitch Asian Cuisine pack. With two styles to choose from Stitch gets to try some delicious Bubble Milk Tea made of tapioca pearls and for the main dish Stitch is seen with chopsticks at hand, ready to munch on some seriously delicious Xiaolongbao, the meat filled steamed buns of 'awesome-ness'. With each food item removable, this set is for fans of the adorable alien Stitch and for the foodies in all of us! Limited Edition of 2000 pieces. Please note: For this item, demand is expected to be higher than the available quantity, which may result in allocations or cancellations of quantities ordered.

products.name: Star Wars The Mandalorian Action Figure 2-Pack 1/6 The Mandalorian & Blurrg 37 cm
products.description:
"You are a Mandalorian! Your ancestors rode the great Mythosaur. Surely you can ride this young foal."

Returning to the beginning of The Mandalorian's story, Star Wars witnessed the eponymous bounty hunter took on a mysterious bounty from a client to search for an asset on the desert planet of Arvala-7. Upon arrival, Mandalorian was assisted by Kuiil the Ugnaught and learned to ride the blurrg in order to reach the settlement seeking the valuable asset.

Fans were instantly captivated by the unfolding of the Mandalorian's journey, and in celebration of Star Wars Day, Sideshow and Hot Toys is excited to present a special 1:6th scale collectible set featuring the Mandalorian in his original armor and the Blurrg!

The Mandalorian collectible figure features meticulously crafted helmet and armor pieces, a finely tailored outfit, detailed weathering effects, a blaster rifle, a blaster pistol, and a display base.

The highly accurate Blurrg is skillfully developed based on the appearance of the creature in The Mandalorian. Standing at approximately 37 cm tall (43 cm with base) and 60 cm in length, it features a greatly detailed head and body, articulated arms, a saddle, and a rocky theme display stand!

This Mandalorian and Blurrg Sixth Scale Collectible Set will be an amazing piece for your special Star Wars collection!
